GateDocument.TextWithNodes: "Emma Corrin and Storm Reid are fashion's newest darlings, and they've got the wardrobe to prove it", "Miu Miu taps a coterie of fresh faces for its latest fashion obsession: Miu-Belle.", "To be invited to join the ranks of the Miu Miu clique is a honoured pastime for nascent models, actors and musicians. The revered invitation almost certainly cements the starlet as a future icon in the making. The frothy, bedazzled world of Miu Miu isn't always the reserve of young Hollywood though, as the rich and distinctive DNA of the brand proves popular with a myriad of women, what Miuccia Prada herself might describe as a multifaceted multitude. And it was these iconic women the Italian brand called on for its 2020 holiday campaign, established names like Kim Basinger, Chloe Sevigny, Du Juan and Raffey Cassidy alongside rising stars like Emma Corrin, Jordan Kristine Seame and Storm Reid. The campaign, lensed by Mert Alas and Marcus Piggott with creative direction by Katie Grand, rounds up the sisterhood of Miu Miu icons, tapping into the label's heritage while signalling a bright, crystal-adorned, future. The notable women, all role models within their respective fields, were called upon to bring their lauded style and individuality to spotlight the brand's equally iconic offering, specifically, pieces from the pre-spring 2021 collection; where oversized collars, sporty staples, ruffles and lashing of crystals coexist in harmony, per the Miu Miu credo. Among the scallop-edged and bow-bedecked collection sits another future classic: the Miu Belle bag, a culmination of the label's distinctive signatures in a neatly formed, pretty package. New for the autumn/winter 2020 season, in iconic matelasse soft leather, the Miu Belle bag keys into the nostalgia synonymous with the label, while delivering on indulgence. Spotted on Storm Reid, the matelasse leather piece is a testament to both the craftsmanship and magic of the brand. Referencing jewellery, the Miu Belle is characterised by its polished metal frame, glossy black clasp and quilted skin, the latter being an instantly recognisable signature of the label's. It doesn't just satisfy within the aesthetics department though, as a matelasse bag requires approximately 60 per cent more leather yet remains light and functional; two factors that should never be overlooked when building out one's wardrobe arsenal. And despite your proclivities, be it for oversized or miniature accessories, Miu Miu delivers on variety in every sense of the word with their Miu Belle bag; now available in a slew of seasonal and classic colourways, the piece also comes in an array of sizes including a large silhouette with a tubular leather handle and detachable shoulder strap, as well as a smaller pochette. All of which, if you refer to Reid and Cassidy, can be worn slung across the shoulder or clutched in hand on the go. In short, this bag proves to be a faithful staple, crafted with form and functional in mind. A worthy addition to any wardrobe, as iconic as Miuccia Prada herself, the talent she taps to front her labels or the women she bares in mind when bringing her vision to life. Discover more and shop the new Miu Belle bag here."
